description: SigNoz is an observability platform for collecting and exploring metrics, traces, and logs, offered as both self-hosted software and a managed cloud service. It supports OpenTelemetry-native ingestion and workspace-based access control for teams and automation.
summary: SigNoz exposes a tenant-hosted HTTP API, SigNoz Cloud OTLP ingestion endpoints, and a hosted MCP server; no public GraphQL API or first-party CLI surface was found.
